# Python

I ask you to consider modularity and reusability as the primary goal and to heed other good software development practices.
- Follow PEP8 style guidelines and use descriptive, English-based naming.
- Utilize type hints for functions and classes to improve clarity.
- Provide clear docstrings for documentation.
- Emphasize error handling and edge-case management.
- Encourage writing unit tests and maintaining separation of concerns.
